definitionorgloss.value: mengadah tangan, mengangkat dan menelentangkan kedua belah tapak tangan seolah-olah meminta sesuatu
to cup hands, to make two hands as a shape of cup (when asking something)

example.value: Sengoi de kisemaj duet ku pasar malam ajeh kitadah iteg nu mai jengoi de belalu ditah-direh.

translation.value: Orang yang meminta sedekah di pasar malam menadah tangan pada orang ramai yang lalu kehulu-hilir.
The person who is asking for money at the night-market cups his hands to the crowds passing by.

definitionorgloss.value: menampung sesuatu (baldi, besen) untuk mengumpul air yang jatuh dari atas (air hujan dsb)
to catch a falling thing (rain, water, etc) with a container

example.value: Apak eng kitadah teu manik ku kateh tong entoi medei kaha-guna teu ajeh kaha-siram ikebon sayo.

translation.value: Bapa saya menadah air hujan di dalam bekas besar kerana dia mahu gunakan air itu untuk menyiram kebun sayurnya.
My father collected rain water in a big container because he wanted to use it to water his vegetables in his farm.

example.value: Biasajeh, pog ibek de kibetader ipepegelap. Bile pog ya kibetader, imaksotjeh iarik ya pegelap.

translation.value: Biasanya, ayam jantan yang berkokok pada waktu subuh. Bila ayam sudah berkokok, maksundya hari sudah pagi.
Usually, a rooster crows at dawn. When it crows, it means that it is already morning.

definitionorgloss.value: kokokan; bunyi ayam jantan yang berlarut-larut

example.value: Amen higei ku kampok, ku ipepegelap buleh hicerengai engrok tader pog.

translation.value: Jika kita tinggal di kampung, pada waktu subuh kita boleh mendengar bunyi ayam berkokok.
If you stay in the village, we can hear the sound of roosters crowing at dawn.

example-2.value: Asa ijam pukol enam pegelap taleh, pog mesti kibetader.

translation-2.value: Tepat pada setiap jam enam pagi, ayam mesti berkokok.
Roosters crow at exactly six every morning.

definitionorgloss.value: to trip over, to stumble over

example.value: Wak Nita behip ijog madei kitades cag jehuk mase kikek rangas.

translation.value: Kaki Wak Nita berdarah kerana tersandung ranting kayu semasa mencari kayu api.
Wak Nita's foot was bleeding because she stumbled over branches while searching for firewood.

definitionorgloss.value: to catch a falling object; to cup hands, to make hands as a shape of cup to ask something

example.value: Amin kitadok iteg, kisemaj duet nu iapak.

translation.value: Amin menadah tangan, meminta duit pada bapanya.
Amin cupped his hands, asking for money from his father.

definitionorgloss.value: mengumpul sesuatu (air hujan dsb) ke dalam telapak tangan atau bekas
to collect something (rain or spring water) in hands or a container

example.value: Mase jik lekat sanget, mase ajeh pekseg mong teu pili. Jik selalo bior et nu mateu dea jitadok teu ju tenglor teu.

translation.value: Semasa kami masih kanak-kanak, ketika itu belum ada air paip. Kami selalu disuruh untuk pergi ke sungai bagi menakung air dari saluran air.
When we were kids, there was no tap water. We were always being asked to go to the river to collect water.

example-2.value: Amek jik kior jimuh gek-gek teu tenadok ajeh ru dek ha mai keknit medei teu pili ya sot.

translation-2.value: Ibu kami menyuruh kami mandi sedikit-sedikit air tadahan tersebut dan simpan bagi oran yang kemudian kerana tiada air (yang keluar) dari air paip.
Our mom asked us to use the stored water carefully and keep some for the next person because there was no water coming from the tap.

Amin kitadok iteg, kisemaj duet nu iapak.
Amin menadah tangan, meminta duit pada bapanya.
Amin cupped his hands, asking for money from his father.
mengumpul sesuatu (air hujan dsb) ke dalam telapak tangan atau bekas
to collect something (rain or spring water) in hands or a container
Mase jik lekat sanget, mase ajeh pekseg mong teu pili. Jik selalo bior et nu mateu dea jitadok teu ju tenglor teu.
Semasa kami masih kanak-kanak, ketika itu belum ada air paip. Kami selalu disuruh untuk pergi ke sungai bagi menakung air dari saluran air.
When we were kids, there was no tap water. We were always being asked to go to the river to collect water.
Amek jik kior jimuh gek-gek teu tenadok ajeh ru dek ha mai keknit medei teu pili ya sot.
Ibu kami menyuruh kami mandi sedikit-sedikit air tadahan tersebut dan simpan bagi oran yang kemudian kerana tiada air (yang keluar) dari air paip.
Our mom asked us to use the stored water carefully and keep some for the next person because there was no water coming from the tap.

sea: Amin kitadok iteg, kisemaj duet nu iapak.
Mase jik lekat sanget, mase ajeh pekseg mong teu pili. Jik selalo bior et nu mateu dea jitadok teu ju tenglor teu.
Amek jik kior jimuh gek-gek teu tenadok ajeh ru dek ha mai keknit medei teu pili ya sot.
ms: Amin menadah tangan, meminta duit pada bapanya.
mengumpul sesuatu (air hujan dsb) ke dalam telapak tangan atau bekas
Semasa kami masih kanak-kanak, ketika itu belum ada air paip. Kami selalu disuruh untuk pergi ke sungai bagi menakung air dari saluran air.
Ibu kami menyuruh kami mandi sedikit-sedikit air tadahan tersebut dan simpan bagi oran yang kemudian kerana tiada air (yang keluar) dari air paip.
en: to catch a falling object; to cup hands, to make hands as a shape of cup to ask something
Amin cupped his hands, asking for money from his father.
to collect something (rain or spring water) in hands or a container
When we were kids, there was no tap water. We were always being asked to go to the river to collect water.

definitionorgloss.value: to endure; to withstand; to last

example.value: Kenon tenek eng tahan bernor kicak lada.

translation.value: Anak kakak saya tahan sekali makan cili padi.
My sister's child can withstand eating red hot peppers.

example.value: Keneng jehuk de biguna ha cenglei abat ajeh pek tahan liu kerana deras kirepot.

translation.value: Batang kayu yang digunakan sebagai ampaian kain itu tidak tahan lama kerana cepat mereput.
The wooden bar used for the clothes hanger did not last because it is quickly rotted.

definitionorgloss-2.value: menahan; tidak melepaskan; memberi sokongan kepada sesuatu supaya tidak jatuh atau tumbang

example-2.value: Bah eng kiterhan ijehuk mangga de cerner ajeh ru memerip batag awat.

translation-2.value: Pakcik saya menahan pokok mangga yang condong itu dengan beberapa batang buluh.
My uncle supported his leaning manggo tree with several bamboo poles.

definitionorgloss-2.value: memberhentikan; melambaikan tangan supaya kenderaan berhenti
to stop; to wave a hand to stop traffic

example-2.value: Jik jiterhan bas ku beg nung.

translation-2.value: Kami memberhentikan bas di tepi jalan.
We waved down the bus at the side of the road.

Wak Sila did not realize that her fish was burnt because she was busy chopping the vegetables while at the same time grilling the fish.

example.value: Eng ngsep tangen amek jop eng ya minyak angin medei itangen ajeh pehod. Kiurok medei silap idaknak kelem jihnek.

translation.value: Saya menyapukan leher nenek saya dengan minyak angin kerana lehernya sakit. Dia berkata kerana tidur silap posisi malam tadi.
I applied ointment to my grandmother's neck because her neck hurt. She said it hurt because she had slept in an awkward position the previous night.

definitionorgloss.value: membawa sesuatu di atas tapak tangan
to hold something on the palm

example.value: Jik jibeh sukan ha mabek sanget. Nanek ju sukan de jibeh, jibeh naibelumbe naitateng cawan de tebeg ya teu. Kumpulan de laju ru lekat mong jeoi teu ku kateh cawan enai, enai ajeh de menang.

translation.value: Kami mengadakan sukan bagi kanak-kanak. Salah satu dari sukan yang kami anjurkan, kami membuat mereka berlumba menating cawan yang penuh dengan air. Pasukan yang laju dan masih mempunyai banyak air di dalam cawan mereka, mereka adalah pemenangnya.

example.value: Bah Selan kitanyak nu pekerjak pejabat pos begeiharok ha isi borang perenghol duet medei kek pek kipanei begeiharok ha isi borang ajeh.

example-2.value: Tenanyak Bah Man nu Tok Pengulu ajeh buleh hipanei isengik kibelal.

translation-2.value: Pertanyaan Bah Man ke Tok Penghulu itu boleh kita ketahui bahawa hatinya sedang marah.

translation.value: Mereka bertaruh duit, siapa yang menang lumba motor dia itu akan dapat duit.

example-2.value: Itenareh Bak Leg mimang pek buleh hien bebincang. Langsong kinyek bealah gek dea buleh kicerengai bengwal mai kilek.

Selepas sudah selesai makan, plastik makan tersebut harus dikoyakkan kerana jika tidak nanti boleh terkena sakit.
After eating, the plastic wrapping must be torn off, because if not, you could get sick later.

example.value: Jik jikek ru jitas memerip ijengoi cincog sebelom jiet jikek rangas dea senang jiha-beg rangas de jiberkep ajeh doh.

Kita boleh menghidapi penyakit taun sekiranya air kita tidak bersih dan tidak mempunyai tandas yang sempurna.
We may suffer from cholera if our water is not clean and we do not have proper toilets.

en: cholera

definitionorgloss.value: mengangkat tangan kepada seseorang sebagai tanda sapaan dari jauh
to raise a hand as a sign of greetings from afar

example.value: Azril kiteal iteg nu eng mase kilintas nong.

translation.value: Azril mengangkat tangannya kepada saya untuk menyapa semasa dia melintas jalan.
Azril raised his hand to greet me as he crossed the road.

definitionorgloss.value: mengacukan jari bagi menunjukkan sesuatu arah atau objek
to point a finger to indicate a direction or an object

example.value: Bah Hem kiteal nu mateu bile ngtanya ku belok buleh ngsuj tek eng.

translation.value: Bah Hem mengacukan jari ke arah sungai apabila saya bertanya di mana saya boleh mencuci tangan.
Bah Hem pointed his finger towards the river when I asked where I could wash my hands.

definitionorgloss.value: redup; untuk cuaca yang tidak panas terik
shady; overcast; describing weather that is not scorching hot

example.value: Amen hiha-tengroj bor ku arik tedeh dea pek bitod ya pengrag.

translation.value: Jika mahu memancing, baik (dilakukan) pada cuaca redup supaya tidak dibakar oleh terik matahari.
If we want to go fishing, it is good to go when it is cloudy so that we don't get sunburned.

definitionorgloss.value: to be under the shade; to take shelter

example.value: Ku kateh ceknip jarha-jog ju pekan neh kimanik. Jadi, jar apak jarbetedeh ku piknoj bas leileh iarik hoj.

translation.value: Di dalam perjalanan mahu pulang dari pekan tadi hujan. Jadi, bapa dan saya berteduh di perhentian bas sehingga hujan berhenti.
It was raining when my father and I were on the way back home from the town. So, we stopped and took shelter at the bus stop until it stopped.

example.value: Nung kampug Wah Mawar tegak taleh inong. Sebab ajehleh mong jeoi kemalangan tejadi ku nong kampug ajeh medei naien laju ku tegak inong.

translation.value: Jalan di kampung Wah Mawar lurus sahaja jalannya. Sebab itulah terdapat banyak kemalangan terjadi di jalanraya kampung tersebut kerana memandu laju di jalan lurus.
Wah Mawar's village road is straight. Hence lots of accidents occur on that road because people tend to drive faster on a straight road.

translation.value: Walaupun waktu sudah pukul 10 malam, kanak-kanak masih segar tidak mengantuk, mereka masih bermain di bilik tidur.

example.value: Mase ku Tapah cinek, Bah Amsal kitegor ha jik.

translation.value: Semasa di (pekan) Tapah tadi, Bah Amsal menegur kami.
When we were at Tapah (town), Bah Amsal greeted us.

example.value: Bah Goston bitegor ya Bah Rizal ha isenilap de kibeh mase sama-sama ubai rop kak lei telas kak de baiha-cap ajeh.

translation.value: Bah Goston ditegur oleh Bah Rizal akan kesilapan yang dia lakukan ketika mereka berdua bersama-sama menggagau ikan sehingga terlepas ikan yang mahu ditangkap.
Bah Goston was admonished by Bah Rizal for the mistake he made when both of them were tickling fish and missed the fish they wanted to catch.

Bah Goston ditegur oleh Bah Rizal akan kesilapan yang dia lakukan ketika mereka berdua bersama-sama menggagau ikan sehingga terlepas ikan yang mahu ditangkap.
en: to greet
When we were at Tapah (town), Bah Amsal greeted us.
to admonish; to criticize
Bah Goston was admonished by Bah Rizal for the mistake he made when both of them were tickling fish and missed the fish they wanted to catch.

example.value: Bok hentok de telas ju itanggongjawab nu iagama, ibangsa ru inegare.

translation.value: Tiada siapa yang bebas dari tanggungjawabnya terhadap agama, bangsa dan negara.
No one is free from the responsibilities of his/her religion, race and nation.

example.value: Kenon dog de jibela sejak isenanget ya telas medei pek jiperasan itali bekneg ku itangen ya repot.

translation.value: Anak monyet yang kami bela sejak kecil sudah terlepas kerana kami tidak perasan tali pengikat pada lehernya sudah mereput.
The baby monkey that we raised since it was small escaped because we did not realize that the rope around its neck was already rotten.

definitionorgloss.value: bagi hari yang lengkap (bagi satu, dua dan tiga dalam Bahasa Semai)
classifier for a complete day (with Semai number one, two and three)

example.value: Bah Rilan ru ikenah ubai melancong seminggu nu Amerika. Ubai baigei nutenem ku New York, niq tenem ku Dallas, nar tenem ku Virgina, ru nar tenem nij ku Las Vegas. Sepanjang tujoh arik ubai ku peteh, ubai betol-betol bairiag baiha-chak ha canak!

translation.value: Bah Rilan dan isterinya melancong seminggu ke Amerika. Sehari mereka tinggal di New York, tiga hari di Dallas, dua hari di Virgina, dan dua hari lagi di Las Vegas. Sepanjang tujuh hari mereka tinggal di situ, mereka betul-betul rindu mahu makan nasi!

Bah Rinlan and his wife went for a holiday to the US. They spent one day at New York, three days at Dallas, two days in Virginia, and two more days at Las Vegas. For the seven days they were there, they really missed eating rice!

ms: Tenggiling sekarang sudah semakin hampir pupus kerana ramai orang memburunya untuk dijual bagi mendapatkan wang.
en: pangolin; scaly ant-eater

definitionorgloss.value: berdosa, melakukan kesalahan; melakukan sesuatu perkara yang melanggar adat kepercayaan atau kefahaman sesuatu kefahaman masyarakat
to sin; to do something that violates the beliefs or beliefs of a community

example.value: Mai hik naipecaya amen pek hicerengai bengwal mai engrak, hik doh hitenghak. Icuntoh, hikep senusah ru nehajap medei pek hicerengai bengwal mai engrak.

translation.value: Orang Asli mempercayai (bahawa) jika kita tidak mendengar kata-kata orang tua, kita akan mendapat dosa. Contohnya (adalah seperti), mendapat kesusahan dan kemiskinan kerana tidak mendengar kata-kata orang tua.
Orang Asli believe that if someone does not obey his parents, he is sinning. For example, he will have difficulties and be poor because he does not listen to his parents.

definitionorgloss.value: pinjam, menggunakan barangan atau peralatan milik orang lain dengan izin atau sebaliknya, walaupun sudah mempunyai barang atau peralatan tersebut
to borrow goods or equipment belonging to others with or without permission, even if one already has those goods or equipment

example.value: Bah Man kigemar betengkar ha hak mai padehal hak ilei pen mong.

translation.value: Bah Man suka menggunakan barang orang lain walaupun dia ada memiliki barang tersebut.
Bah Man likes to borrow other's things, even though he also has his own.

definitionorgloss.value: memakai pakaian yang tidak sesuai saiz

example.value: Amek Wa Ngah kicerite ha kenon menaleh de kitengkar ha ibaju hamapen ibaju ajeh it.

translation.value: Ibu Wah Ngah mencerita mengenai anak perempuan yang memakai bajunya yang tidak sesuai dengan saiznya walaupun bajunya itu sempit.
Wah Ngah's mother told us about her daughter who wore clothes that did not fit her, even though her clothes were tight.

definitionorgloss.value: tetamu; orang yang datang melawat ke rumah; orang yang dijemput untuk hadir ke dalam sesuatu majlis
visitor;  people who come to visit the home; people who are invited to attend a ceremony

example.value: Amek eng ru tetenek kerdor eng sibok naibrenchet ku dengwal medei naiha-jamu tengloh, kekawat apak de naihol ju Pahang.

translation.value: Ibu dan kakak-kakak saya sibuk memasak di dapur kerana mereka mahu menjamu tetamu, (iaitu) kawan-kawan bapa (saya) yang datang dari Pahang.
My mother and my sisters are busy cooking in the kitchen because they want to prepare food for the visitors, who are my father's friends from Pahang.

definitionorgloss.value: paip; sesuatu (belahan buluh, paip pvc, dsb.) yang digunakan untuk melancarkan aliran air
pipe; something (bamboo, pvc, cement, etc.) used to channel water flow

example.value: Ku jaman manah entem, mase pekseg lekat mong teu pili, mai hik naiguna tenglor awat naisambung teu nu deng teu.

translation.value: Pada zaman dahulu, semasa belum ada air paip, Orang Asli menggunakan paip buluh (bagi) menyambungkan air ku bilik air.
Long ago, before pipe water was introduced, the Orang Asli used bamboo pipes to channel water to the bathroom.

definitionorgloss.value: to have a headache; painful in head

example.value: Apak Wak Mar kihol nu madeg jik, kisemanj penglaay medei tengor ikui kena ya manik mase kijog ju kerjak cinek.

translation.value: Bapa kepada Wak Mar datang ke rumah kami, meminta ubat kerana kepalanya sakit kerana ditimpa hujan semasa pulang dari kerja tadi.

definitionorgloss.value: sejenis anyaman yang menggunakan bilah-bilah batang bertam yang sudah diraut untuk dijadikan dinding rumah dsb.
a type of weaving that uses the polished bar sticks to be used for a home wall, etc.

example.value: Hunen ya susah hiha-neng deg de idinig ju tepas. Ku kampug jik, had deg atok eng taleh de idinig deg ya tepas. Deg mabek kilek amen pek ya awat atao papat, mesti ya simen.

translation.value: Sekarang sudah susah untuk kita lihat rumah yang dindingnya dari tepas. Di kampung kami, cuma rumah datuk saya sahaja yang dindingnya dari tepas. Rumah yang lain jika tidak dari buluh atau papan, mesti dari simen.

Nowadays it is hard to see a house with a tepas wall. In our village, only the wall of my grandfather's house is made from tepas. Other houses, if the walls are not bamboo or wood, must be made of cement.

definitionorgloss.value: teratai, sejenis tumbuhan air yang tumbuh di dalam tasik

example.value: Mase cuti sekulah padeh jeh, jik nuperingak jirahroh nu Taiping. Mong jicekcip nu Tasik Taiping ru jineng mong jeoi teratei ku tasek ajeh.

translation.value: Semasa cuti sekolah tempoh hari, kami sekeluarga berjalan-jalan ke Taiping. Kami ada pergi ke Tasik Taiping dan melihat ada banyak teratai di tasik tersebut.

example.value: Bah Ket sedeh kirasa medei ikerjak sekulah Matematik ajeh ihad susah. Bok hentok de buleh betulog kiseryap ikerjak sekulah medei rimnar iapak ru iamek pek ubai besekulah entem.

translation.value: Bah Ket merasa sedik kerana kerja sekolah Matematiknya sangat susah. Tiada siapa yang mampu menolong dia menyiapkan kerja sekolahnya tersebut kerana kedua-dua ibu bapanya tidak besekolah dahulu.
Bah Ket was sad because his maths homework was very hard. Nobody could help him because neither of his parents had ever been to school.

definitionorgloss.value: bencana; malapetaka; hal atau perkara yang menimpa seseorang atau sesuatu tempat akibat melanggar adat kepercayaan atau melawan hukum tuhan, dewa dsbnya
disaster; catastrophe; something that happens to a person or a place as a result of violating the custom of belief or in violation of the law of a god or sprite, etc.

example.value: Mai hik naipecaya, amen hidajal ha binatag doh mest hikena terlaj. Bibalas ya jenang bahneh enai ajeh ru pes jear, atao beag, atao garaj.

translation.value: Orang Asli percaya (bahawa) jika kita mendera binatang, nanti kita akan kena (balasan) malapetaka. Dibalas oleh tuhan perbuatan mereka itu dengan ribut petir, atau banjir, atau tanah runtuh.
Orang Asli people believe that if we torture animals, we will be repaid with natural disasters. God will pay back their actions with violent storms or floods or land slides.

example.value: Bah Sani bien nu halak medei ilei biterloh ya nyanik mase kimamuh ku teu talag ku kampug englag.

definitionorgloss.value: terus; lantas; tidak berhenti; tidak bertangguh; tidak singgah di mana-mana lansung
continuously; nonstop; with no delay; with no stops

example.value: Bile ngtanya nu sengoi ku tepi nong chinek, ku belok deg Bah Sani, kiberlag begei adeh, "Cip teros, agok belok. Hacip tegak taleh, inong ku ke depan atah doh baru habakek simpang nu deg Bah Sani."

translation.value: Bila saya tanya pada orang di tepi jalan tadi, di mana rumah Bah Sani, dia menjawab, "Jalan terus, jangan belok. Kamu jalan lurus sahaja, jalan (ke rumahnya) di depan atas sana nanti, barulah kamu akan lihat simpang ke rumah Bah Sani."

When I asked someone at the side of the road about the direction to Bah Sani's house, he said, "Keep going straight, do not turn. Keep going straight and the road (to his house) will be in front of you, only then will you see the junction to Bah Sani's house."

example.value: Hik manusia kena hingut lapan gelas teu nuarik.

translation.value: Kita (sebagai) manusia harus minum lapan gelas air sehari.
We humans should drink eight glasses of water a day.

example.value: Jengoi kak nai liloi kateh teu.

translation.value: Banyaknya ikan berenang dalam air.
There are lots of fish swimming in the water.

example.value: Bile mong mase lapang, jik rimdij nuperingak jiet jitengroj nu tew ku belakang deg.

translation.value: Bila ada masa yang lapang, kami sekeluarga semua pergi memancing ke sungai di belakang rumah.
When we have free time, our entire family goes fishing at the river to the rear of our house.

example-2.value: Bok iteu ngeknut adeh? Ha gu ngut ya eng.

translation-2.value: Air minum siapa ini? Saya rasa macam nak minum.
Whose drinking water is this? I feel like I want to drink it.

example.value: Ku kasut menang eng mong cektat tik.

The boundary between the aboriginal people's area and the Malay area is a small river.

example.value: Tik hik adeh entem pernah bigei ya mai Jepon.

sea: Ku kasut menang eng mong cektat tik.
Sempadan tik mai hik ru tik Gop bipisah ya teu lalek.
Tik hik adeh entem pernah bigei ya mai Jepon.
Beng perigik ajih jeoi tik lok, jadi hod cip abor. Amen tok, doh melekat jog hik ku kateh tik log ajeh.
ms: Terdapat tanah yang melekat pada kasut adik saya.
Dalam tanah itu ada banyak cacing.
Sempadan kawasan orang Asli dan kawasan orang Melayu dipisahkan oleh sebatang sungai yang kecil.
Negeri kita dahulu pernah diduduki oleh orang Jepun.
Berhampiran dengan kawasan perigi itu ada banyak tanah liat, jadi harus jalan dengan berhati-hati. Jika tidak, kaki akan melekat di dalam tanah liat tersebut.
en: soil; earth; dirt; ground
There is dirt on my younger brother's shoe.
In the ground there are many worms.
district, state, province; area; land

example.value: Bah Sani kigeram medei hamapen ya memerip kali kisuj iteg, ngoi belacat ku iteg tik mong.

translation.value: Bah Sani geram kerana walaupun telah berberapa kali membasuh tangan, (tapi) bau belacan ditangannya masih ada.
Bah Sani got angry because even though he had washed his hands several times, the smell of belacan still remained on them.

example.value: Kucig ajeh tik suj hamapen kijer ju keneng jeer de ihad tinggi.

translation.value: Kucing itu masih hidup walaupun jatuh dari pokok kelapa yang sangat tinggi.
That cat is still alive even though it fell from a very high coconut tree.

example.value: Nong nu kampug Bah Sadan ajeh tik ceher, jadi telas hijog ju kampug ajeh, kerite hik doh kijadi renanj, melekat ya tik ajeh.

example.value: Mase cuti sekulah padeh jeh, jik mong jibeh lawatan nu Melaka. Ku pajeh jimelawat nu istane manah kote Melaka de rek beng timbok manah kote ajeh de tik gek taleh de mong hunen.

translation.value: Semasa cuti sekoleh tempoh hari, kami ada mengadakan lawan ke Melaka. Di situ kami melawat istana lama kota Melaka yang hampir dengan tembok lama kota itu yang masih ada sedikit sahaja yang tinggal sekarang.
During the school holiday, we visited Melaka. There we visited the little that remains of the old palace of Melaka city near the old city wall.

example.value: Kebanyakkan kampug hik hunen ya mong nong timbok, tapi lekat mong juga kampug-kampug de ku pendalaman de pekseg lagi mong nong timbok bibeh ya kerajaan.

en: paved road; tarred road
Most Orang Asli villages already have paved roads, but there are still villages in the rural area that  do not yet have paved roads built by the government.

example.value: Mai naiurok ku batag arik kampug jik mong buaya, mong iarik doh kitimbol nu kemiil teu. Tapi eng pek ngpecaya medei pek pernah ngbakek.

translation.value: Orang berkata bahawa di sungai kampung kami terdapat buaya, ada masanya dia akan timbul ke permukaan air. Tapi saya tidak percaya kerana tidak pernah melihatnya.
People say that there is a crocodile in the river at our village, and that sometimes it will rise to the surface of the water. But, I do not believe it because I have never seen it.

definitionorgloss.value: timbul; naik ke permukaan (dari dalam air ke permukaan air); muncul atau naik ke atas dari dalam air
to emerge; to rise to the surface

example.value: Biasajeh, mai naiet naibejala kak ku idui medei mong jeoi kak naitimul.

translation.value: Biasanya orang akan menjala ikan pada waktu petang kerana terdapat banyak ikan yang timbul.
Usually people will go fishing with cast nets during the evening because a lot of fish  appear at the surface during that time.

example.value: Tingkap adeh ifungsi dea buleh pinoi ru cahya mat arik kimuj nu kateh dek. Tapi amen iarik kimanik, tingkap bitutop dea pek kiperai ya manik.

translation.value: Fungsi tingkap adalah bagi membenarkan angin dan cahaya matahari masuk ke dalam rumah. Tetapi sekiranya hujan, tingkap ditutup supaya tidak tempias oleh hujan.
The function of window is to let air and sunlight enter the house. But if it is raining, the windows will be closed so that the rain water will not spill inside.

definitionorgloss.value: lembing yang ada mata dibuat daripada besi, diguna untuk menangkap ikan atau labi-labi dsbnya.
a metal-tipped wooden spear used for catching fish or turtles

example.value: Biasajeh, mai hik naiguna tirok bile naiha-kek peas.

translation.value: Biasanya Orang Asli menggunakan lembing semasa mencari labi-labi.
Usually the Orang Asli use a spear when they are hunting for turtles.

definitionorgloss.value: menikam; mencari sesuatu (labi-labi, ikan, dll) dengan menggunakan lembing
to hunt somthing (turtle, fish, etc.) with a spear

example.value: Apak eng kitirok peas.

translation.value: Bapa saya mencari labi-labi dengan lembing.
My father is hunting turtles with a spear.

definitionorgloss-2.value: menikam; mencari labi-labi atau ikan dengan alat macam seligi
to stab; to spear; to pierce for spearfishing, hunting with a spear (fish, turtles, etc.)

example-2.value: Apak eng kiet nu tenirok peas, tapi kijog pek kien ma-ma medei langsong pek naiberkep nuikor pen.

translation-2.value: Bapa saya pergi menikam labi-labi, tapi dia pulang tangan kosong kerana mereka tidak mendapat apa-apa walaupun seekor.
My father went spearing turtles, but he returned home empty-handed because they didn't get any, not even one.

example.value: Biasajeh, jik jibeh hal lijiik memaseg ku kateh deg. Tapi amen mong cerite P. Ramlee ku tiwi, dikdij lijik mesti sama-sama jigei ku ngar tiwi.

translation.value: Biasanya kami akan membuat hal masing-masing di dalam rumah. Tetapi jika ada cerita P. Ramlee di televisyen, kesemua kami mesti sama-sama duduk di hadapan televisyen.
Usually we will do our own thing at home. But if the P. Ramlee movie is being played on television, all of us will sit in front of it.

Usually we will do our own thing at home. But if the P. Ramlee movie is being played on television, all of us will sit in front of it.

example.value: Ajeh Tuan Rosli. Ileileh pemilek kilang adeh.

translation.value: Itu Tuan Rosli. Dialah pemilik kilang ini.
That is Mr. Rosli. He is the owner of this factory.

example.value: Encik Lim ajeh tuan tik kampug jik adeh. Hamapen kampug jik adeh ku kemil tik sawet kek, ilei pek pernah kihalau jik ju kendeh.

translation.value: Encik Lim adalah pemilik tanah kampung kami ini. Walaupun kampung kami ini berada di atas tanah sawit beliau, (tetapi) dia tidak pernah menghalau kami dari sini.
Mr. Lim is the land owner of our village. Even though our village is located on his palm oil plantation, he has never asked us to move away from here.

example.value: Eng selalo ngneng mong poster binatag daknek de nyep bitampal ku peknoj bas. Ituan binatang ajeh kijanji kiog benayar nu bok taleh de bebakek ibinatag daknek de nyep ajeh.

translation.value: Saya selalu melihat terdapat poster binatang peliharaan yang hilang ditampal di perhentian bas. Tuannya berjanji akan memberi bayaran kepada sesiapa sahaja yang menjumpai binatang peliharaan tersebut.
I always see posters of lost pets being posted at the bus stop. The owner of the pet promises to pay whoever finds and returns the lost pets.

Saya selalu melihat terdapat poster binatang peliharaan yang hilang ditampal di perhentian bas. Tuannya berjanji akan memberi bayaran kepada sesiapa sahaja yang menjumpai binatang peliharaan tersebut.
en: sir; Mr.
That is Mr. Rosli. He is the owner of this factory.
owner; master
Mr. Lim is the land owner of our village. Even though our village is located on his palm oil plantation, he has never asked us to move away from here.
I always see posters of lost pets being posted at the bus stop. The owner of the pet promises to pay whoever finds and returns the lost pets.

sea: Ajeh Tuan Rosli. Ileileh pemilek kilang adeh.
Encik Lim ajeh tuan tik kampug jik adeh. Hamapen kampug jik adeh ku kemil tik sawet kek, ilei pek pernah kihalau jik ju kendeh.
Eng selalo ngneng mong poster binatag daknek de nyep bitampal ku peknoj bas. Ituan binatang ajeh kijanji kiog benayar nu bok taleh de bebakek ibinatag daknek de nyep ajeh.

example.value: Bah Gerej kisip entah ku belok kidek tukol de kiguna kelemnek, hunen ya kaha-guna nij ya bepayah-payah hod kikakkek canuk ha itukol ajeh.

translation.value: Bah Gerej lupa di mana dia meletakkan tukul yang dia gunakan semalam, sekarang harus bersusah-payah mencari dahulu tukul tersebut (sebelum) dapat menggunakannya lagi.
Bah Gerej has forgotten where he put the hammer that he used yesterday, now he will have to struggle to find that hammer before he can use it again.

definitionorgloss.value: tulah; bala atau kecelakaan akibat mengingkar larangan orang tua atau adat kepercayaan
a consequence or an accident caused as a result of disobeying elderly people or customs related to belief

example.value: Maay hik naipecaya hik pek buleh hisebot muh mai engrak sebarang, amen lekat hibeh juga doh hikena tulah begei hieksiden.

translation.value: Orang Asli mempercayai (bahawa) kita tidak boleh menyebut nama orang tua dengan sembarangan, jika masih berkelakuan sedemikian pasti akan ditimpa tulah seperti kemalangan.
The Orang Asli believe that we cannot mention the name of an elderly person carelessly; if someone continues to behave like that, he will certainly be afflicted with hardships such as an accident.

Orang Asli mempercayai (bahawa) kita tidak boleh menyebut nama orang tua dengan sembarangan, jika masih berkelakuan sedemikian pasti akan ditimpa tulah seperti kemalangan.
en: a consequence or an accident caused as a result of disobeying elderly people or customs related to belief
The Orang Asli believe that we cannot mention the name of an elderly person carelessly; if someone continues to behave like that, he will certainly be afflicted with hardships such as an accident.

definitionorgloss.value: toyol; an undead infant in South-East Asian folklore

example.value: Mak Jah kipanjap bile kisedar iduit daknek ru ibarang kemas de kibercep ku kateh ilemari ya nyep. Kiurok dikdij ajeh bisij ya tuyol, padehal bisij ya kenon litau ilei sakreh.

translation.value: Mak Jah menangis sekuat hati bila menyedari duit simpanan dan barang kemasnya yang dia sembunyikan di dalam almarinya telah hilang. Dia mendakwa semua itu dicuri oleh toyol, padahal dicuri oleh anak terunanya sediri.

Mak Jah cried loudly after she realized that her savings and her jewellery that she had hidden in the closet had gone missing. She claimed that it had been stolen by a kind of ghost, but the truth is that it was stolen by her own unmarried son.
